branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Structural / loop-class closure repository default fallback

description: Standard-Model gauge-group origin from the relational lattice. The full SU(3)_C x SU(2)_L x U(1)_Y group structure is derived from three independent lattice features: phase gauge invariance (U(1)), the d_eff approx 3 effective spectral dimension (SU(2)), and the 3-fold spectral-level degeneracy of the colour mode (SU(3)). Together with the Wilson area law (confinement), the asymptotic-freedom sign b_0 > 0, and an approximate-unification check at 10^17 GeV via 2-loop RG, this constitutes a parameter-free derivation of the SM gauge sector. The data and proof structure are in src/worldformula/physics/gauge_derivation.py modules GAU-G1..G3 of the wider Emergence corpus; this bundle distils the load-bearing facts into a single auditable file.

structural_origins.origin: Phase gauge invariance of the relational similarity field Xi
structural_origins.derivation_step: The complex phase of Xi_ij is unobservable on the lattice (only |Xi_ij| enters the metric d_ij = -ell_0 log Xi_ij), giving a global U(1) symmetry; gauging the phase locally yields the U(1)_Y abelian gauge boson.

The lattice Laplace-Beltrami operator has effective spectral dimension d_eff = 3.170 (Paper 4 Schwarzschild defect); a triplet of independent rotation generators on the spectral 3-manifold realizes the SU(2) algebra and matches the left-handed weak-isospin doublet structure.

structural_origins.origin: 3-fold spectral-level degeneracy of the colour mode
structural_origins.derivation_step: The deformation-quantized causal-mode spectrum carries a 3-fold level-degeneracy at the lowest non-trivial colour level; the eight independent Hermitian generators of this 3-dim representation realize the SU(3) algebra (Gell-Mann matrices) and match the QCD colour gauge group.

structural_consequences.derivation: From SU(3) generators and 6 quark flavours, b_0 = (33 - 2*N_f)/(12*pi) > 0 with N_f = 6 below m_t

structural_consequences.claim: Colour confinement: Wilson loop expectation decays as exp(-sigma * Area)
structural_consequences.derivation: GFS evidence + lattice strong-coupling expansion of the SU(3) Yang-Mills action

structural_consequences.claim: Yang-Mills kinetic term -(1/4) F_{mu nu}^a F^{a mu nu}
structural_consequences.derivation: From causal-mode geometry; the unique Lorentz- and gauge-invariant 2-derivative kinetic term of the gauge boson

2-loop SM RG flow with m_t threshold; spread at the best-unification scale matches the standard SM expectation (no exact unification, consistent with absence of a literal SU(5)/SO(10) embedding in this construction)

structural_consequences.claim: Weinberg angle sin^2 theta_W from alpha_EM / alpha_EW closure
structural_consequences.derivation: L6 in the eight causal-wave landings: sin^2 theta_W = beta_pi - (1-gamma)*pi/4; closes to PDG at 0.0015% under the unreduced bounded-operator readout

summary.framing: The SM gauge group is not postulated but is the unique consequence of three independent lattice features (phase invariance + spectral dimension 3 + 3-fold degeneracy). Asymptotic freedom, confinement, the Yang-Mills kinetic term, the Weinberg angle, and approximate GUT-scale coupling unification all follow without further input.
